[HOOK].text: What lies beyond the event horizon? | TEXT: BEYOND
[HOOK].visual_prompt: Astronomer looking up at the stars with a hint of curiosity

[CURIOSITY].text: Black holes are the cosmic enigmas that fascinate and intimidate us. | TEXT: UNRAVELING
[CURIOSITY].visual_prompt: Person sitting at a computer, surrounded by books and notes

[EXPLANATION].text: Their mystery has captivated us for centuries, and yet, we're still learning. | TEXT: DISCOVER
[EXPLANATION].visual_prompt: Scientist looking at data on a screen with a look of excitement

[INSIGHT].text: The allure of the unknown is what drives us to explore, to seek answers. | TEXT: INSPIRE
[INSIGHT].visual_prompt: Person standing at the edge of a cliff, looking out at the vast universe

[ENDING].text: And what lies beyond the event horizon? The mystery remains, waiting to be solved.
[ENDING].visual_prompt: Astronomer looking up at the stars with a hint of curiosity
